news.title:
UTI AMC disclosed a one-on-one analyst/investor meeting with Quantum Mutual Fund on 10th Feb 2026.
The meeting will occur at BKC, Mumbai, with no UPSI shared as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
UTI AMC disclosed a one-on-one analyst/investor meeting with Quantum Mutual Fund on 10th Feb 2026.
The meeting will occur at BKC, Mumbai, with no UPSI shared as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Nuvama upgrades UTI Asset Management to 'Maintain Buy' with a revised target of 1,490.
The target price was previously set at 1,650, indicating a downward revision.
news.summary:
Nuvama upgrades UTI Asset Management to 'Maintain Buy' with a revised target of 1,490.
The target price was previously set at 1,650, indicating a downward revision.

news.title:
UTI AMC's Q3 results show Rs. 423.6 cr standalone, Rs. 517.9 cr consolidated revenue.
Exceptional expense of Rs. 104.3 cr noted due to VRS and labor code impact.
news.summary:
UTI AMC's Q3 results show Rs. 423.6 cr standalone, Rs. 517.9 cr consolidated revenue.
Exceptional expense of Rs. 104.3 cr noted due to VRS and labor code impact.

news.title:
UTI AMC appoints Mr. Kapil Udaiwal as President & Head of Human Resources effective 1st Jan 2026.
Mr. Udaiwal brings 23+ years of experience in ITES, IT, and BFSI sectors, including leadership roles at Ageas Federal Life Insurance.
news.summary:
UTI AMC appoints Mr. Kapil Udaiwal as President & Head of Human Resources effective 1st Jan 2026.
Mr. Udaiwal brings 23+ years of experience in ITES, IT, and BFSI sectors, including leadership roles at Ageas Federal Life Insurance.

news.title:
UTI AMC saw a block trade of ~240,170 shares at Rs. 1122.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 26.97 crores.
news.summary:
UTI AMC saw a block trade of ~240,170 shares at Rs. 1122.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 26.97 crores.

news.title:
UTI AMC schedules board meeting on 21st Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and 9-month FY26 results.
The meeting will also address other business matters; details on www.utimf.com.
news.summary:
UTI AMC schedules board meeting on 21st Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and 9-month FY26 results.
The meeting will also address other business matters; details on www.utimf.com.

news.title:
UTI AMC to hold an analyst/investor meeting on Dec 19, 2025, in Mumbai.
No UPSI will be shared; meeting will be one-on-one with Awriga Capital Advisors.
news.summary:
UTI AMC to hold an analyst/investor meeting on Dec 19, 2025, in Mumbai.
No UPSI will be shared; meeting will be one-on-one with Awriga Capital Advisors.

news.title:
UTI Asset Management held its 9th EGM on 25 Nov 2025 via VC/OAVM, chaired by Mr. Dinesh Kumar Mehrotra.
Special resolutions included appointments of independent directors; voting results to be disclosed post scrutiny.
news.summary:
UTI Asset Management held its 9th EGM on 25 Nov 2025 via VC/OAVM, chaired by Mr. Dinesh Kumar Mehrotra.
Special resolutions included appointments of independent directors; voting results to be disclosed post scrutiny.

news.title:
AMC stocks like Nippon, HDFC, and UTI AMC fell up to 3% as equity mutual fund inflows dropped 19% in October.
Flexi Cap Funds surged to ₹8,928.71 cr, while debt inflows rose to ₹1.56 lakh cr; AUM reached ₹80 lakh cr in Oct 2025.
news.summary:
AMC stocks like Nippon, HDFC, and UTI AMC fell up to 3% as equity mutual fund inflows dropped 19% in October.
Flexi Cap Funds surged to ₹8,928.71 cr, while debt inflows rose to ₹1.56 lakh cr; AUM reached ₹80 lakh cr in Oct 2025.

news.title:
UTI AMC schedules its 9th EGM on 25th Nov 2025 via VC/OAVM, complying with SEBI & MCA regulations.
Key agenda includes appointment of independent directors and voting accessible through e-voting from 22nd to 24th Nov 2025.
news.summary:
UTI AMC schedules its 9th EGM on 25th Nov 2025 via VC/OAVM, complying with SEBI & MCA regulations.
Key agenda includes appointment of independent directors and voting accessible through e-voting from 22nd to 24th Nov 2025.

news.title: UTI AMC launches Voluntary Retirement Scheme, affecting P&L by ₹857.9M.
news.summary: UTI AMC launches Voluntary Retirement Scheme, affecting P&L by ₹857.9M.

news.title:
UTI AMC to incur ₹85.8 crore in Q3 FY25-26 due to VRS expenses.
Cost involves ex-gratia payments, impacting P&L; SEBI-compliant disclosure.
news.summary:
UTI AMC to incur ₹85.8 crore in Q3 FY25-26 due to VRS expenses.
Cost involves ex-gratia payments, impacting P&L; SEBI-compliant disclosure.

news.title:
UTI AMC announces senior management change; Indranil Choudhury resigns as Group President & Head of HR.
Choudhury requested early release from UTI AMC before notice period due to personal matters.
news.summary:
UTI AMC announces senior management change; Indranil Choudhury resigns as Group President & Head of HR.
Choudhury requested early release from UTI AMC before notice period due to personal matters.

news.title:
SEBI proposes reduced MF expense ratios, impacting HDFC AMC, Nippon India AMC, UTI AMC, Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC.
Brokerage fee caps lowered to 2 bps for cash market, 1 bps for derivatives; STT, GST remain outside expense limits.
news.summary:
SEBI proposes reduced MF expense ratios, impacting HDFC AMC, Nippon India AMC, UTI AMC, Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC.
Brokerage fee caps lowered to 2 bps for cash market, 1 bps for derivatives; STT, GST remain outside expense limits.

news.title:
Sector-focused mutual funds outperformed despite market stagnation, delivering over 15% returns in a year through thematic equity strategies.
Key funds include DSP Banking, ICICI Pru, UTI Transport, HDFC Defense, and HDFC Transport, with top holdings like Bajaj Finance, ICICI Bank, and Tata Motors.
news.summary:
Sector-focused mutual funds outperformed despite market stagnation, delivering over 15% returns in a year through thematic equity strategies.
Key funds include DSP Banking, ICICI Pru, UTI Transport, HDFC Defense, and HDFC Transport, with top holdings like Bajaj Finance, ICICI Bank, and Tata Motors.

news.title:
Avantel falls 13% after Q2 results reveal 30% sales drop, EBITDA down 63%, margins halved to 23.7%.
UTI AMC sees biggest fall since 2020 IPO, down 10% due to revenue drop, rising costs, and market share loss.
news.summary:
Avantel falls 13% after Q2 results reveal 30% sales drop, EBITDA down 63%, margins halved to 23.7%.
UTI AMC sees biggest fall since 2020 IPO, down 10% due to revenue drop, rising costs, and market share loss.

news.title:
Tejas Networks, UTI AMC, Havells India shares plunge post-Q2 results; UTI AMC down 10%, Tejas 9%, Havells 3.5%.
Q2 results: UTI AMC profit drops 53%, Tejas suffers Rs 307 cr loss; Havells profit rises 20% but faces weak demand concerns.
news.summary:
Tejas Networks, UTI AMC, Havells India shares plunge post-Q2 results; UTI AMC down 10%, Tejas 9%, Havells 3.5%.
Q2 results: UTI AMC profit drops 53%, Tejas suffers Rs 307 cr loss; Havells profit rises 20% but faces weak demand concerns.

news.title:
Crisil reports 12.6% YoY rise in Q3 PAT to Rs 193.1 cr.
Ratings Services segment income grows 11.2% YoY to Rs 267.6 cr.
news.summary:
Crisil reports 12.6% YoY rise in Q3 PAT to Rs 193.1 cr.
Ratings Services segment income grows 11.2% YoY to Rs 267.6 cr.

news.title:
UTI AMC's Q2 net profit fell to ₹1.7B from ₹2B YoY.
Revenue declined to ₹3.9B compared to ₹4.17B in the same period.
news.summary:
UTI AMC's Q2 net profit fell to ₹1.7B from ₹2B YoY.
Revenue declined to ₹3.9B compared to ₹4.17B in the same period.

news.title:
UTI AMC shared Q2 and H1 FY2025-26 financial results and investor presentation, reporting 10% YoY revenue growth, with total AUM at ₹22.42 lakh crore.
UTI AMC's QAAUM grew 10.47% YoY, driven by strong B30 city penetration, digital transactions, and international presence in 30 countries.
news.summary:
UTI AMC shared Q2 and H1 FY2025-26 financial results and investor presentation, reporting 10% YoY revenue growth, with total AUM at ₹22.42 lakh crore.
UTI AMC's QAAUM grew 10.47% YoY, driven by strong B30 city penetration, digital transactions, and international presence in 30 countries.
